title: Replacing RMS Norm with Gated Linear Layer and Profiling Kernels in PufferLib
summary: Worked on optimizing PufferLib kernels by replacing RMS norm with a gated linear layer that uses sigmoid and multiplicative gating on the output, achieving sub-20-second solves and higher throughput. Identified the backward kernel as a bottleneck and began planning formal kernel benchmarks and architecture sweeps for release.
